feed.title: SAP Community - SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central
feed.subtitle: SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Cross entity business rule to make sure job and comp effective dates are the same
entry.content:
Hi,

Has anyone set up business rules to ensure that the dates in the Job Info and Comp Info portlets are the same? This is a requirement from one of my clients, and I would like to hear about your experience and how this was achieved before we proceed.

Appreciate all feedback

Br,

Ines

entry.title: How can i see all employees while navigating in SuccessFactors employee central ?
entry.content:
I am currently struggling to consult an overview of all current employees withing a certain company. 

I do not want to create a report, i want to consult as an HR admin all employees under my company. 

And then select an employee from that list to update some information. 

 

It can not be that i have to know the name per person or the personID of an employee in order to be able to change certain information? Or that i have to work employee by employee.

entry.title: Which tools do you use for CSV files?
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I currently have more to do with SuccessFactors HCM than I would like.
Anyway, I have noticed that you have to deal with a lot of CSV files and the separators and date / time formatting is very limited.

So a CSV file from SuccessFactors HCM always uses a comma, if another separator is possible, then this is very rare.
The other is the date / time, here the system is a little more flexible but there are also components that only know MM/DD/YYYY.

Well I work in Europe and the date format MM/DD/YYYYY and the comma separator isn't common for people and MS tools here.
So MS Excel can't be used.

So I wanted to ask around, which tools do you use to edit and view these CSV files?
I explicitly do not want to use MS Excel, as this type of CSV file cannot be handled without technical knowledge

Thanks for your input 😄

Greetings
Andy

entry.title: Storing 10 Years of Compensation Statements in Employee Profile
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I have a customer requirement to store up to 10 years of Compensation Statements in the Employee Profile. The goal is to ensure these documents remain accessible for a decade, linked directly within each employee's profile.

I would like to know if anyone is aware of any limitations or best practices related to this. Specifically:

  1. Are there any system limitations in terms of storing and retrieving up to 10 compensation statements per employee over this period?
  2. Could having up to 10 compensation statements in the profile lead to performance issues, especially in terms of loading times or system responsiveness?
  3. Are there any recommendations on how to efficiently manage and store such a large amount of compensation data without impacting system performance?

Any insights or experiences on this would be greatly appreciated!

Thanks in advance for your help!

entry.title: Creation of image based dynamic signiture on Document Generation (As RCM Offer Letter)
entry.content:
Hi all, 

Is it possible to create dynamic image based signiture in document templates. According to a KBA In RCM offer letters, it can be done via raise a incident to SAP.

Can we do the same thing in EC document generation.

entry.title: Restrict User to make changes to Payroll Area effective start date of next Pay Period
entry.content:
We have to create a business rule under Compensation Information, so that changes made to Payroll Area are effective Begin date of next Pay Period.

In order to achieve that we have created a Variable to Get Start Date of Next Pay Period(). And under If Expression applied a condition that "

If

Compensation Information Model.Payroll Area.Value is not equal to Compensation Information Model.Payroll Area.Previous value 

And

Compensation Information Model.Event Date. Value is not equal to Variable (var_Begin date of Next pay Period))

Then

Raise "Error Message"

But, we are not able to get Start Date of Next pay Period with the help of this variable. May I know if any one has applied a business rule to achieve this. Thanks!

entry.title: Default pay components for white collar
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a scenario as below

pay scale structure objects (pstype, area, group, level) are enabled recently. Compensation structure is a new MDF object enabled as well.

compensation structure has been defined with relevant pay components under each. many such compensation structures are created and pay components differ for each category. This set up has been done for each countries - Belgium, Finland, Sweden, Norway. one such example as shown below

while trying to make adjustments on existing employee (via change job and comp info) with the combination selected as white collar (from PS objects) along with relevant compensation structure entry as selected, expectation at compensation information portlet is that I am able to see pay components which are configured as per the compensation structure object. This is working fine.

how ever the same behavior is not seen for a new hire, meaning all pay components are appearing instead of only pay components as per compensation structure object.

there are no business rules which are currently controlling it. Is there a way to achieve it?

entry.title: Mapping "Total Team Size" Field from Employee Profile to Background Elements
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I am currently working on a scenario where we need to include the Total Team Size field in the Background Elements, as it directly influences the bonus plan for employees. The Total Team Size is a field present in the Employee Profile, and we would like to know if it is possible to map this field to the Background Elements, as it appears in the dropdown list when mapping fields.

However, when attempting to map the field, I encounter the following error:

Has anyone encountered this issue or knows if there are any specific configurations needed to successfully map this field? Any guidance or suggestions would be greatly appreciated!

Thank you in advance for your help!

Best regards,

entry.title: Service Consumption Model for SuccessFactors Compound Employee API (SOAP) - Invalid SessionID
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am consuming SuccessFactors' Compound Employee API (SOAP) using the Service Consumption Model (Web Service) in ABAP Cloud. The methods (Login, Query, Logout, etc.) were generated from the SOAP WSDL file.

While the Login method successfully provides the SessionID in the response, I encounter an error, "Invalid SessionID", when calling the Query method.

In CPI, this is managed internally by the SuccessFactors adapter, and in SOAP UI, it is handled using the 'Maintain HTTP session' option. However, I am unsure how to implement similar behavior in ABAP Cloud to ensure the session is maintained across calls.

I would appreciate any guidance or suggestions on handling the session effectively.

Thank you in advance for your support!

Best regards,
Mohit

entry.title: Attachment in Custom MDF or in any portlets
entry.content:
Hi All,

Is it possible to attach a document in Eligibility for Advances? when employee access the Eligibility for Advances portlet, they should be able download the attachment.

Your response will be greatly appreciated.

Thanks and Regards,

Shashidhar

entry.title: java.lang.IllegalStateException: java.lang.NullPointerException when trying to add a new employee
entry.content:
Hello experts,

This error message appears when I try to add a new employee. Any help please?

entry.title: customize position object template
entry.content:
Hello SAP community,

I would like to request support from any of you on the following query:

Is it possible that from SuccessFactors, you can customize the templates of different objects in the system, for example: Customize the template of the position object to only lower certain fields for the import of bulk load.

I remain attentive

entry.title: Send Email Notifications for Pending Absence Requests SSFF
entry.content:
Hello all.

We want the managers to approve or reject the absence requests, instead of just leaving them in Pending status. We would like to know if there is a way inside SSFF to create email notifications for the absence request that have Pending status, and that those emails get sent to their corresponding managers.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Future of Talent Profile and Growth Portfolio
entry.content:
Hi SAPians, 
I need your expertise on the future of the Talent Profile and Growth Portfolio in SuccessFactors. My company is considering whether to keep the Talent Profile or transition to the Growth Portfolio. Specifically, I have the following questions:

  • What is the future of the Talent Profile in SAP SuccessFactors HCM Suite, and what is SAP's vision for it moving forward? Is it being phased out in favor of the Growth Portfolio
  • If there is a migration from the Talent Profile to the Growth Portfolio, which blocks could be migrated?
  • Does SAP have any plans to integrate the Talent Profile into the Growth Portfolio

Thank you for your insights!

entry.title: SuccessFactors Employee Central Certification
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am starting my journey with SuccessFactors, I am using SAP learning for same.I am not associated with any SAP customer or partner. Please help me with below questions.

  1. How can I get system access for practice and How can I enroll for certification?
  2. Is Learning HUB subscription is the only way to get system access and scheduling an exam?
  3. Any other suggestions

Thanks

Jyoti

entry.title: Query Pending Workflow Details via entity TodoV2 API
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

Hope everyone doing fine.

I got requirement from customer to query all pending workflows in SF with all changed data old value and new value, and expecting to do action approve and reject via custom application.

So what we currently do is, we use ToDo V2 entity to get pending workflows where categoryId= '14' and '17' as per reference here 

This is how it looks like via posman.

{
    "d": {
        "results": [
            {
                "__metadata": {
                    "uri": "https://api44preview.sapsf.com/odata/v2/WfRequest(918L)",
                    "type": "SFOData.WfRequest"
                },
                "wfRequestId": "918",
                "lastModifiedDateTime": "/Date(1731983617000+0000)/",
                "lastModifiedBy": "61111467",
                "module": "HRIS",
                "reminderSentDate": null,
                "totalSteps": 9,
                "createdDateTime": "/Date(1731983617000+0000)/",
                "createdOn": "/Date(1731983617000)/",
                "url": null,
                "lastModifiedOn": "/Date(1731983617000)/",
                "parentWfRequestId": null,
                "createdBy": "61111467",
                "currentStepNum": 1,
                "status": "PENDING",
                "wfRequestUINav": {
                    "__deferred": {
                        "uri": "https://api44preview.sapsf.com/odata/v2/WfRequest(918L)/wfRequestUINav"
                    }
                },
                "parentWfRequestNav": {
                    "__deferred": {
                        "uri": "https://api44preview.sapsf.com/odata/v2/WfRequest(918L)/parentWfRequestNav"
                    }
                },
                "workflowAllowedActionListNav": {
                    "__deferred": {
                        "uri": "https://api44preview.sapsf.com/odata/v2/WfRequest(918L)/workflowAllowedActionListNav"
                    }
                },
                "empWfRequestNav": {
                    "__deferred": {
                        "uri": "https://api44preview.sapsf.com/odata/v2/WfRequest(918L)/empWfRequestNav"
                    }
                },
                "wfRequestParticipatorNav": {
                    "__deferred": {
                        "uri": "https://api44preview.sapsf.com/odata/v2/WfRequest(918L)/wfRequestParticipatorNav"
                    }
                },
                "wfRequestCommentsNav": {
                    "__deferred": {
                        "uri": "https://api44preview.sapsf.com/odata/v2/WfRequest(918L)/wfRequestCommentsNav"
                    }
                },
                "wfRequestStepNav": {
                    "__deferred": {
                        "uri": "https://api44preview.sapsf.com/odata/v2/WfRequest(918L)/wfRequestStepNav"
                    }
                }
            }
        ]
    }
}

 then, we navigate to wfrequestUINav, and it will be look like this.

{
    "d": {
        "__metadata": {
            "uri": "https://api44preview.sapsf.com/odata/v2/WfRequestUIData(918L)",
            "type": "SFOData.WfRequestUIData"
        },
        "wfRequestId": "918",
        "businessUnit": null,
        "isEffectiveDateType": true,
        "isObjectBase": false,
        "assigneeUserId": null,
        "operateUserName": "MUHAMAD IRFAN TAUFIQ",
        "assigneeUserName": null,
        "jobTitle": "OPERATOR TP(17100182)",
        "legalEntity": null,
        "objectType": null,
        "division": null,
        "receivedOn": null,
        "department": null,
        "costCenter": null,
        "deeplink": "https://hcm-ap20-preview.hr.cloud.sap/sf/hrisworkflowapprovelink?workflowRequestId=V4-0-a1-jeRuUg-UbT1cXjxSysAAPkZFfnfud_mgVo-nr1T1eQ&prevPage=HOME&company=ptpamapersT1&username=SFAPI",
        "todoSubjectLine": "MUTASI for ANTONIUS AGUNG TEGUH SURYADI",
        "operateType": "Initiated",
        "subjectUserId": "61102176",
        "changedData": null,
        "eventReason": "MUTASI",
        "actionType": null,
        "isAssigned": false,
        "operateUserId": "61111467",
        "objectName": null,
        "location": "BTSJ",
        "actions": "[{\"action\":\"approve\"}]",
        "operateDate": "November 19, 2024",
        "effectiveDate": "October 1, 2024",
        "subjectUserName": "ANTONIUS AGUNG TEGUH SURYADI"
    }
}

 and the client expectation is to get similar changed data old value and new value as picture below which is not populated in wfrequestUIData

So my question is, is this expected behavior? we cannot fetched data via API as picture above? only use deeplink?

 

Thank you!
Reza Dwi

entry.title: Payment confirmation for SAP certification - CER001
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have made the payment for the certification - CER001 (India) based on their guidance via create case option in SAP learning. I have made the payment on 03-Jan and confirmed them but I have not got any response from them till date. I wanted to know what is the usual timeline for them to confirm on payment and release the access. Also is there any other way to contact them apart from the create case option.

Please pour in your suggestion, thanks.

entry.title: There's nothing to show yet - Compensation Portlet
entry.content:
Hello Team,

Good day!

Does anyone experienced data not showing in the portlet even if the right permission was given?

This is in particular with Compensation Information, but if you open the history page or View All you can see that there are data.

Thank you!

Regards,

Gelo

entry.title: Education and Tuition Reimbursement in SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hi

We have a requirement from a customer to validate that the Education Reimbursement/Claim amount entered in SuccessFactors Global Benefits/Custom MDF matches the amount on the attached invoice/proof. Essentially, we are looking for an OCR tool to perform this validation, which should work with SuccessFactors.

Additionally, we are considering whether it's possible to manage education reimbursements through Concur. My understanding is that Concur may not fully support education reimbursements due to varying entitlements for different dependent children, such as 5000 for the first child, 7000 for the second child, and so on. Concur doesn't have these dependent details to validate this.

If users enter the claim in SuccessFactors, can we send this information to Concur for validation using its OCR capabilities?

Thanks for the help.

@karenperez @brendas

entry.title: SuccessFactors_unable to default a HRIS field value after BASIC business rule scenario gone
entry.content:
Hi All, 

With the basic rule scenario deprecated, I'm unable to find a simple scenario work. 

My use case is very simple, in the workPermitInfo HRIS element, I would like to always default (country value, let's say USA) in country field when portlet opened to enter a record. When portlet opened, country should be defaulted (however would be able to change) and then I can add other permit data and save it. 

The Trigger onView rules for HRIS elements,  which says "You can use this scenario to create rules that default the value for a field" is not working. 

I've created a onView rule on Base Object workPermitModel and it just doesn't work when assigned to the business rule. In the past I made this scenario work through Basic scenario and with ruletype"DefaultFields".

Can anybody help me on this please? How to achieve this?

Regards

DRP.

@lukemarson @btoombs @svishwas @Daichi_Kagawa, @stockp , @NarendraLahoti , @cindywang , @S_Strangfeld
